title: Sobha Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sobha Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
